title: File Type
description: TYPO3 CMS Content Blocks File Type

name.description: Unique identifier for the Content Block in the format vendor/content-block-name

prefixFields.description: Field identifiers will be prefixed with the Content Block name.

prefixType.description: Determines how to prefix the field if prefixFields is enabled.

vendorPrefix.description: Will be used instead of the vendor part of name

typeName.description: The typeName has to be one of these keywords

basics.description: Basics which are appended after the fields definition.
